changeSet.author: Eugene A. Kalosha
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE process ( id serial, organization_id integer DEFAULT NULL, name character varying (255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', description text DEFAULT NULL, owner_id integer DEFAULT NULL, revenue_processed float DEFAULT NULL, business_unit_id integer DEFAULT NULL, notes text DEFAULT NULL, created_by_id integer DEFAULT NULL, updated_by_id integer DEFAULT NULL, created_at timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), updated_at timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), CONSTRAINT pk_process PRIMARY KEY (id) , CONSTRAINT fk_process_to_organization FOREIGN KEY (organization_id) REFERENCES organizations (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION , CONSTRAINT fk_process_to_owner_id FOREIGN KEY (owner_id) REFERENCES users (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION , CONSTRAINT fk_process_to_business_unit FOREIGN KEY (business_unit_id) REFERENCES business_units (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION , CONSTRAINT fk_process_to_created_by FOREIGN KEY (created_by_id) REFERENCES users (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION , CONSTRAINT fk_process_to_updated_by FOREIGN KEY (updated_by_id) REFERENCES users (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION ); CREATE INDEX i_process_organization ON process (organization_id); CREATE INDEX i_process_organization_id_name ON process (organization_id, name); CREATE INDEX i_process_name ON process (name); CREATE INDEX i_process_owner ON process (owner_id); CREATE INDEX i_process_business_unit ON process (business_unit_id);
